title: How I Built My Front-End Project Library
content:
Over time, I built nearly 100 front-end projects: games, utilities, CSS visualizers, and full applications. This blog post walks through how that collection came together and what I learned along the way.

I started with tiny projects: counters, modals, and simple games. Then I moved into CSS playgrounds, visualizers, and UI components. Eventually, I built full apps like a personal finance tracker, recipe finder, and portfolio site.

The biggest lesson: consistency beats intensity. Small, focused projects add up.
